The '''Fortress of Axion''' was a [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] corporate fortress on [[Axion]], believed to be impenetrable. After the end of the [[Dark Reaper]] campaign of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Unidentified Colicoid engineer|Colicoid engineer]] who designed the [[protodeka]] was imprisoned within the Fortress. In the [[Battle of Axion]], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] force under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Brolis]] was sent to capture the [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]; only Brolis survived to reach the stronghold. After calling for reinforcements, Brolis waited while [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] fought his way past a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droid]] to reach him.
